emails.subject: UPDATE - Meteorologist Search
emails.body: UPDATE Meteorologist Search We have identified two good candatites who would be available for a London interview the week of the 18th: 1. Kerryn Hawke 2. Stephen Cusack also strong but not available for that week is 3. Piero Chessa (working for ECMWF in Italy) we have a couple others here in the states if the London interviews don't work out. I am forwarding under separate cover Kerryn and Stephen's CV's with telephone numbers to Jen - Mike
